net_income: Not provided in excerpt (statement of operations truncated)
qoq_changes: Revenue increased 3.3% QoQ to $672.7 million (vs implied Q1 2025 revenue of $651.2 million)
Goodwill decreased significantly from $137.1 million to $38.1 million, reflecting an impairment charge
Long-term debt increased substantially from $2.29 billion to $2.98 billion
new_risks: Potential elimination of the de minimis exemption for commercial goods imported into the U.S.
Incurred impairment charges for goodwill and other long-lived assets
Continued pressure on consumer discretionary spending due to inflation and macroeconomic uncertainty
management_tone: Cautious, as management highlights ongoing macroeconomic pressures on consumer discretionary spending, geopolitical uncertainty, and recent goodwill impairment charges.
analyst_note: While Etsy achieved modest 3.8% YoY revenue growth in Q2 2025, the balance sheet indicates a significant goodwill impairment and a nearly $700 million increase in long-term debt, suggesting underlying challenges and a need to monitor capital allocation and profitability closely.
